scripts.dev: npm run services:up && npm run services:wait:database && tsx watch --env-file=.env.development server.ts
scripts.test: npm run services:up && concurrently -n node,vitest --hide node -k -s command-vitest "tsx --env-file=.env.test server.ts" "vitest run"
scripts.test:watch: npm run services:up && concurrently -n node,vitest --hide node -k -s command-vitest "tsx --env-file=.env.test server.ts" "vitest watch"
scripts.test:coverage: npm run services:up && concurrently -n node,vitest --hide node -k -s command-vitest "tsx --env-file=.env.test server.ts" "vitest run --coverage"
